title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Orochi, Unknown person #12, Big Mom as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let the war reign down fortune on us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I get skinny I'll get too pretty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you guys getting hyped for this evening?!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Now for Orochi's crew, the Samuel Patrol!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Finally, some guests that aren't such strangers anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: QUEEN is better off gone, toss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just called us jokesters, Tss, did you hear him just now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop. Shouldn't you be finding new ways to talk about fashion or something? It's worrysome!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh, so fragile, what are you my grandpa?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Who'd be up next in your opinion?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be thankful if you pull out, that goes for the thorn in our side, page one.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 50 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
